description_long: This is a quilted fabric grocery bag with a playful and colorful design. The main body of the bag is red with a blue band along the bottom, and it features a large, detailed applique of a brown and tan dinosaur with white teeth and a red tongue on one side. The bag has two sturdy, padded loop handles made from the same blue material as the bottom band. The quilting pattern is diamond-shaped, giving the bag a soft, cushioned appearance. The reverse side of the bag is plain red with no design or branding visible. The bag appears to be empty or only lightly filled, as it maintains a mostly flat shape.
description: A quilted red and blue grocery bag with a dinosaur applique and padded loop handles, featuring a soft, cushioned texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red quilted surface, blue bottom band, and a large dinosaur applique with visible details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the bag's slim profile, blue handle, and the thickness of the quilted fabric.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain red quilted surface with a blue bottom band and no visible design or branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the dinosaur applique and the bag's overall thickness.
attribute_branding_or_logo: dinosaur applique design, no text or branding
